description: Delete a LinkedIn post by URL. Navigates to the post, opens the '...' more options menu, clicks 'Delete post', confirms the deletion dialog, and verifies the post is removed. IRREVERSIBLE — logs the post text before deleting.

reasoning.research: LinkedIn post deletion flow: navigate to post URL → click '...' menu → click 'Delete post' → confirmation dialog appears ('Are you sure you want to delete?') → click 'Delete' button to confirm. The confirmation dialog is a modal with role=dialog.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use role=button[name='Open control menu'] for the '...' button. The 'Delete post' menu item uses role=menuitem. The confirmation dialog's Delete button uses role=button[name='Delete']. All role-based for maximum stability.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Wait 400ms after '...' click for dropdown. Wait 500ms after 'Delete post' click for confirmation dialog. No typing needed. Total interaction is faster than create/edit.
reasoning.llm_learnings: CRITICAL: This action is IRREVERSIBLE. Always capture the post text content BEFORE clicking delete (step 2 in execution_trace). LinkedIn shows a confirmation dialog — must click 'Delete' (not the close X). After deletion, LinkedIn redirects to feed or shows empty state. Check for redirect to confirm success.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 3s + extract text 0.5s + dropdown 0.4s + confirm dialog 0.5s + confirmation 0.3s. Total: ~5-6s.
reasoning.safety: Pre-deletion: capture full post text and store in artifact. If artifact write fails, abort deletion.

post_url.description: Full URL of the LinkedIn post to delete. Format: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:NNNNN/

post_page.note: Navigate to post. Verify the post is visible before attempting deletion.

post_content_capture.note: Capture post text BEFORE deletion for audit trail. Non-blocking — proceed even if not found.

confirm_delete_button.note: Confirms deletion in the dialog. Wait for redirect or feed to reload.

execution_trace.note: Navigate to post. Must be logged in and post must belong to this account.
SAFETY: Capture post content for audit trail before deletion. Store in artifact.
Confirm deletion. IRREVERSIBLE. LinkedIn redirects to feed after success.
Confirm deletion succeeded by checking URL changed or post is gone.

pre_delete_text.example: The original post content captured before deletion for audit...

output_example.pre_delete_text: Updated: Excited to share our latest AI automation research. The future is now. #AI #Automation

metadata.safety_note: IRREVERSIBLE. Pre-deletion text is captured and stored in artifact for audit. Abort if capture fails. Only works on posts owned by the authenticated account.
